title: 24-Piece Christmas Party Gift Boxes Set with Assorted Design Tags and Twine - for Wrapping Christmas Treats, Advent Calendar Gifts, and Holiday Party Favors,Cybermonday
features: Complete Party Set: This set includes 24 Christmas gift boxes, 24 lengths of twine, and 24 assorted design tags, featuring 6 unique styles. This comprehensive package ensures you have everything you need to beautifully wrap your Christmas gifts, creating an inviting display for your festive celebrations and advent calendar preparations.

Creative and Festive Tag Designs: The included tags come in 6 delightful designs, with 4 pieces of each type, allowing you to personalize your gift packaging effortlessly. These creative embellishments enhance your holiday spirit and let you express your unique style, ensuring your gifts stand out and bring joy to the recipients.

Ideal Size for Small Gifts: Each gift box measures 7 x 5 x 10 cm, making them the perfect size for packing small gifts, treats, or handcrafted items. The lightweight and portable design allows for easy transport and storage, making them perfect for holiday parties, school celebrations, or as part of your Christmas countdown decorations.

Durable and Eco-Friendly Material: Crafted from high-quality kraft paper, these gift boxes are sturdy, durable, and environmentally friendly. The accompanying natural twine complements the boxes beautifully, providing a rustic touch that enhances your handmade wrapping style, ensuring your gifts are both attractive and sustainable.

Versatile Applications for the Holiday Season: These Christmas gift boxes are not just for presents; they can also be used to wrap candy, create personalized advent calendars, or serve as charming decorations for your holiday gatherings. Spread cheer among family and friends by using these festive boxes to enhance your Christmas celebrations and bring everyone together in the spirit of giving.
description: Elevate your holiday gifting experience with our 24-Piece Christmas Party Gift Boxes Set, designed to bring joy and creativity to your festive celebrations. This comprehensive set includes 24 beautifully crafted gift boxes, complete with 24 lengths of natural twine and 24 assorted design tags featuring 6 unique styles. With everything you need to create stunningly wrapped gifts, this set is perfect for Christmas parties, advent calendars, and thoughtful gift-giving. The versatility of the included tags is a standout feature of this set. With 6 different designs, each tag can be personalized to match your unique style or the personality of the recipient. This attention to detail not only enhances the visual appeal of your gifts but also adds a personal touch that shows how much you care. Your friends and family will appreciate the effort you put into making their gifts special. Each gift box measures 7 x 5 x 10 cm, making them ideal for a variety of small gifts, from sweet treats to handcrafted items. Their lightweight and portable design means you can easily transport them, whether you’re heading to a holiday party, school event, or visiting friends and family. Additionally, these boxes can serve as delightful decorations in your home, enhancing the festive atmosphere as Christmas approaches. Constructed from durable kraft paper, these gift boxes are not only sturdy but also eco-friendly. You can give gifts with confidence knowing they are packaged in sustainable materials. The accompanying natural twine adds a rustic charm, perfectly complementing the design of the boxes and offering a handmade touch that enhances the overall presentation of your gifts. The applications for these Christmas gift boxes are numerous and varied. They are perfect for wrapping gifts, but they also serve as delightful containers for candies or small treats.
